# AIPUSH

> AI-Optimized Page Distribution for Traffic & Sales

## About

AIPUSH generates AI-optimized landing pages that help businesses get cited by AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI). Each page follows AEO (AI Engine Optimization) best practices with structured semantic HTML, evidence-backed content, and full indexability.

## Links

- [AIPUSH App](https://aipush.app)
